title: Iran Strait of Hormuz warning adds to shipping uncertainty
summary_full: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.
summary_public: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.
